rows.label: qev040401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well then, it's about time to end playtime-mo!
Roll call-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0002
rows.name: Satsu! Yoyotsu! Gotsu! Mumutsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0003
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0004
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0005
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0006
rows.name: Alright! Everyone is here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmmmm?
Something is wrong-mo! One more time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0008
rows.name: Satsu! Yoyotsu! Gotsu! Mumutsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0009
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0010
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0011
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0012
rows.name: J-just as I thought, Satsu isn't here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Where did he go-mo!
What do we do-mo! What do we do-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what happened.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0020
rows.name: Calm Down

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0021
rows.name: Make him take a deep breath.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0014
rows.name: You're Dad's BLADE acquaintance-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm not Dad-mo!
Tatsu is your Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0016
rows.name: What on earth happened-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0017
rows.name:
All of us siblings were playing hide-and-seek-mo!
And then one of us went missing-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Na-na-na-na-na! That's terrible-mo!
We have to go look for him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0019
rows.name:
It's terrible-mo! Breathe in and out deeply-mo?
L-like this-mo... *inhale* *exhale* *inhale* *exhale*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0020
rows.name: I've calmed down a little-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0021
rows.name: What on earth happened-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0022
rows.name: Ah, Dad![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0023
rows.name:
All of us siblings were playing hide-and-seek-mo!
And then one of us went missing-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Na-na-na-na-na! That's terrible-mo!
We have to go look for him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Wait, Tatsu is not Dad-mo!
I'm your Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0026
rows.name: So, who is the one that went missing-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0027
rows.name: It's the third son, Satsu-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0028
rows.name: Let's go look for him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0029
rows.name: This area is swarming with dangerous monsters-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0030
rows.name: Let's go look for him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0031
rows.name:
Satsu is a sleepyhead, so
he might be peacefully sleeping somewhere-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0032
rows.name:
If a dangerous monster eats him while he's sleeping,
it will be terrible-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0030
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Warn them that it's dangerous for
Nopon to wander around here.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0040
rows.name: Caution

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Suggest that they should act cautiously
because there seem to be many dangerous monsters.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Even if you say that,
I can't just leave my little brother to die-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0034
rows.name:
But if we dilly-dally,
who knows what will happen to my little brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0050
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0051
rows.name: Suggest splitting up and searching with everyone.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0060
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0061
rows.name: Say that someone should stay here.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0035
rows.name: But maybe someone should stay here-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0036
rows.name:
If no one is here when Satsu comes back,
it will be a problem-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0037
rows.name:
That's certainly true-mo.
If no one is here when Satsu comes back,
it will be a problem-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Got it, Dad!
If no one is here, Satsu will cry-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0039
rows.name: I said I'm your Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0040
rows.name: Then Jitsu will stay here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0041
rows.name: Yoyotsu will go look for Satsu at the Seabound Coil Tree-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0042
rows.name: Gotsu will go look for Satsu at the Sunlit Spring-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0043
rows.name: Mumutsu will go look for Satsu at Decapotamon-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Then Tatsu and the others will search
near the caravan first-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0046
rows.name: Please, I want you to find Satsu-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0047
rows.name: Ah! He's back-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0048
rows.name: *mumble mumble* Ah! Brother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0049
rows.name:
Satsu, I'm glad you're safe-mo.
Everyone went looking for you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0050
rows.name:
Sorry for making you worry-mo.
But I'm happy that everyone cares about Satsu-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0051
rows.name: Then we have to get our little brothers to come back-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0052
rows.name:
Get them to come back-mo!
Wait, how do we contact them-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0053
rows.name:
Oh no-mo! I didn't think about that-mo!
What should we do-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0070
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0071
rows.name: Suggest contacting them with comm devices.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0080
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0081
rows.name: Suggest contacting them via telepathy.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0054
rows.name:
Comm devices can be sold for a high price,
so Nopon sell them immediately-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0055
rows.name: That's just how it is-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0056
rows.name: We can't get in contact with them-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0057
rows.name:
If we could use something that convenient,
we wouldn't be having a hard time-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0058
rows.name: Don't underestimate Nopon! -mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0059
rows.name: That's nothing to brag about-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0090
rows.name: Action

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0091
rows.name: Suggest going to look for them.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0100
rows.name: Standby

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0101
rows.name:
Suggest staying put to avoid
everyone getting separated again.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0060
rows.name: Jitsu, Satsu, we're going to search for them in a hurry-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Even if you say that, I'm worried about my little brothers-mo!
Jitsu, Satsu, we're going to search for them in a hurry-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0062
rows.name:
Wait-mo!
If everyone goes, we'll just get separated again-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0063
rows.name:
That's right, that's right-mo!
I have a feeling Satsu will just fall asleep somewhere again-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0064
rows.name:
We'll have [ST:playername ] go look for
our little brothers once more-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0065
rows.name:
Jitsu will wait here with Satsu-mo!
We're counting on you-mo!
[ST:playername ] is our only hope-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0066
rows.name: We're counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0067
rows.name: We're counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0068
rows.name:
When we say [ST:playername ] is our only hope,
you're our only hope-mo!
Please bring all of our brothers back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0069
rows.name: Ah! Dad, now everyone is gathered-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0070
rows.name: I told you I'm not Dad-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0110
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0111
rows.name: Apologize for being late.

rows.label: qev040401_JNK0120
rows.name: Complain

rows.label: qev040401_SEL0121
rows.name: Say it was tough tracking everyone down.

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0071
rows.name: That's not true-mo! Thank you for your hard work-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0072
rows.name: Thank you so much for bringing everyone back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0073
rows.name:
I'm sorry-mo... Thank you-mo...
But thanks to you, all of us brothers are together-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0074
rows.name: Thank you so much-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0075
rows.name: Dad, you have good companions-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0076
rows.name:
Yeah... Wait, how many times are you going to get it wrong before you're satisfied-mo...
...Anyway, let's do roll call-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0077
rows.name: Jitsu! Satsu! Yoyotsu! Gotsu! Mumutsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0078
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0079
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0080
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0081
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0082
rows.name: Here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0083
rows.name: Dad and the five brothers are all here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0084
rows.name:
Six brothers-mo!
All six of us are here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0085
rows.name: We're all here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0086
rows.name: We're all here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0087
rows.name: We're all here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0088
rows.name: We're all here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040401_MSG0089
rows.name: We're all here-mo![ST:wait ]
